title: coelogyne pallide-flavens var. brevilabrata
intro: Coelogyne pallide-flavens var. brevilabrata is a rare and endangered species of orchid, scientifically classified under the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its extracts exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coelogyne pallide-flavens var. brevilabrata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used to create teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
